inputs.label: Voltage
inputs.businessContext: Arc voltage during welding, measured at the power source terminals. Affects total energy input.

businessContext_i18n.en: Arc voltage during welding, measured at the power source terminals. Affects total energy input.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynak sırasında güç kaynağı terminallerinde ölçülen ark voltajı. Toplam enerji girdisini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Lichtbogenspannung während des Schweißens, gemessen an den Stromquellenklemmen. Beeinflusst den Gesamtenergieeintrag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tension d'arc pendant le soudage, mesurée aux bornes de la source de courant. Affecte l'énergie totale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tensión de arco durante la soldadura, medida en los terminales de la fuente de alimentación. Afecta la energía total de entrada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: جهد القوس أثناء اللحام، يُقاس عند أطراف مصدر الطاقة. يؤثر على إجمالي مدخلات الطاقة.

inputs.label: Current
inputs.businessContext: Welding current, typically measured with a clamp meter. Higher current increases heat input.

businessContext_i18n.en: Welding current, typically measured with a clamp meter. Higher current increases heat input.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynak akımı, tipik olarak bir pens ampermetre ile ölçülür. Yüksek akım, birim uzunluk başına ısı girdisini artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Schweißstrom, typischerweise mit einem Zangenamperemeter gemessen. Höherer Strom erhöht den Wärmeeintrag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Courant de soudage, généralement mesuré avec une pince ampèremétrique. Un courant plus élevé augmente l'apport thermique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Corriente de soldadura, medida típicamente con una pinza amperimétrica. Mayor corriente aumenta la entrada de calor.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تيار اللحام، يُقاس عادة بمقياس المشبك. التيار الأعلى يزيد من مدخلات الحرارة.

inputs.label: Travel Speed
inputs.businessContext: Speed of the welding torch along the joint. Faster speeds reduce heat input per unit length.

businessContext_i18n.en: Speed of the welding torch along the joint. Faster speeds reduce heat input per unit length.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynak torcunun birleşme hattı boyunca hızı. Daha yüksek hızlar birim uzunluk başına ısı girdisini azaltır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschwindigkeit des Schweißbrenners entlang der Naht. Höhere Geschwindigkeiten reduzieren den Wärmeeintrag pro Längeneinheit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de déplacement de la torche le long du joint. Des vitesses plus rapides réduisent l'apport thermique par unité de longueur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad de avance de la antorcha a lo largo de la unión. Velocidades más rápidas reducen la entrada de calor por unidad de longitud.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سرعة شعلة اللحام على طول المفصل. السرعات الأسرع تقلل من مدخلات الحرارة لكل وحدة طول.

inputs.label: Arc Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Thermal efficiency factor of the welding process (e.g., 0.8 for SMAW, 0.9 for GMAW, 1.0 for SAW).

businessContext_i18n.en: Thermal efficiency factor of the welding process (e.g., 0.8 for SMAW, 0.9 for GMAW, 1.0 for SAW).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynak prosesinin termal verimlilik faktörü (örn. SMAW için 0.8, GMAW için 0.9, SAW için 1.0).
businessContext_i18n.de: Thermischer Wirkungsgrad des Schweißprozesses (z. B. 0,8 für MMA, 0,9 für MAG, 1,0 für UP).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'efficacité thermique du procédé de soudage (ex. 0,8 pour SMAW, 0,9 pour GMAW, 1,0 pour SAW).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de eficiencia térmica del proceso de soldadura (ej. 0,8 para SMAW, 0,9 para GMAW, 1,0 para SAW).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل الكفاءة الحرارية لعملية اللحام (مثل 0.8 لـ SMAW، 0.9 لـ GMAW، 1.0 لـ SAW).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
